scripts.test:query: node -e "if (!process.env.EXPORT_PLATFORM_TEST_DATABASE_URL) { console.error('BLOCKED - 需要人工介入: tests/query requires a real MySQL URL in EXPORT_PLATFORM_TEST_DATABASE_URL.'); process.exit(1); }" && node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/query/*.test.mjs
scripts.test:file: node -e "if (!process.env.EXPORT_PLATFORM_TEST_DATABASE_URL) { console.error('BLOCKED - 需要人工介入: tests/file requires a real MySQL URL in EXPORT_PLATFORM_TEST_DATABASE_URL.'); process.exit(1); }" && node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/file/*.test.mjs
scripts.test:sample: node -e "if (!process.env.EXPORT_PLATFORM_TEST_DATABASE_URL) { console.error('BLOCKED - 需要人工介入: tests/sample requires a real MySQL URL in EXPORT_PLATFORM_TEST_DATABASE_URL.'); process.exit(1); }" && node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/sample/*.test.mjs
